narrative_role: Atto II, l'esplorazione cauta. Primo accenno di arancione narrativo.

prompt_components.subject: a small wooden rowing boat (a scialuppa) with three figures rowing, all seen from behind or in profile silhouette
prompt_components.action: the boat moves steadily toward a white sandy beach; the rowers pull oars in slow synchronized rhythm
prompt_components.environment: shallow turquoise-grey water transitioning to a white beach with very subtle warm orange tints in the sand reflection (subtle, not obvious), the mysterious island looms beyond with its strange geometric formations
prompt_components.camera_movement: slow lateral tracking, parallel to the boat's motion, maintaining steady distance
prompt_components.lighting: diffused midday light with a slight golden tint, the beach catches a barely-perceptible warm glow that hints at what is to come
prompt_components.mood: cautious, exploratory, the threshold of discovery
prompt_components.audio_hint: wooden oars slicing through calm water, distant gulls, gentle wind, low ambient drone from the island still present

_critical_note: PRIMO ACCENNO di arancione narrativo. Deve essere SOTTILE, quasi subliminale. Mai vistoso.
acceptance_criteria: L'arancione nella sabbia è appena percepibile, non saturo
Tre figure visibili nella scialuppa, mai volti
La sagoma dell'isola sullo sfondo è coerente con scena 05
